productDisplayName: Belkin Unisex Dash Tall Messenger Black Netbook Bag
description: The Simple Dash Tall messenger bag from belkin offers plush comfort for your netbook. With loads of organiser space, this bag offers 360 degree access to all your gear when on the go. One main compartment for your netbook with a velcro closure Padded laptop compartment A separate organizational storage pocket Two zippered compartments on the back and at the front Removable and adjustable shoulder strap with a padded holder Haul loop for carrying ease Care Hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent
